question.text: Within how many calendar days from the end of each quarter must all AIFs submit quarterly reports to SEBI?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** All AIFs shall submit quarterly report on their activity to SEBI within 10 calendar days from the end of each quarter. **The Trap:** 30 days is the CTR submission deadline, not the quarterly activity report deadline. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Category III AIFs have an additional obligation to report leverage undertaken on a quarterly basis.
